root_cause: ReplicaSet failed to adopt a matching orphan Pod
evidence: Pod 'payments-api-orphan-5d8d7' has no controlling ownerReference but matches active ReplicaSet 'payments-api-7f8c7d66c4'
Observed 2 recent ReplicaSet adoption failure event(s) within 20 minutes

Representative adoption failure: ReplicaSet "payments-api-7f8c7d66c4" cannot adopt Pod "payments-api-orphan-5d8d7": failed to update ownerReferences for adoption: Operation cannot be fulfilled on pods "payments-api-orphan-5d8d7": the object has been modified; please apply your changes to the latest version and try again
Reconciliation symptom: Deployment 'payments-api' remains at 1/3 available replicas while only 1/3 replicas are updated

causes.message: A matching Pod exists without a controlling ReplicaSet ownerReference, so ReplicaSet adoption is expected
ReplicaSet repeatedly failed to write ownership while attempting to adopt the matching Pod
ReplicaSet reconciliation remains degraded because matching orphan Pods are not being adopted successfully

pod:payments-api-orphan-5d8d7: Pod is orphaned from controller ownership but still matches a live ReplicaSet selector
replicaset:payments-api-7f8c7d66c4: ReplicaSet "payments-api-7f8c7d66c4" cannot adopt Pod "payments-api-orphan-5d8d7": failed to update ownerReferences for adoption: Operation cannot be fulfilled on pods "payments-api-orphan-5d8d7": the object has been modified; please apply your changes to the latest version and try again
deployment:payments-api: Deployment 'payments-api' remains at 1/3 available replicas while only 1/3 replicas are updated

likely_causes: ReplicaSet controller hit repeated optimistic-lock or API update conflicts while trying to write ownerReferences
Admission or policy machinery blocked ownerReference updates during ReplicaSet adoption
A manually created or orphaned Pod still matches the ReplicaSet selector but cannot be cleanly adopted
Concurrent metadata mutation on the Pod is preventing ReplicaSet adoption from converging
suggested_checks: Inspect ownerReferences, labels, and recent ReplicaSet controller events on the orphan Pod
Review admission/policy controllers or metadata mutators that may be rewriting the Pod during adoption
